text: What does the Factory Method pattern help you achieve?
options: Creates objects without specifying the exact class
Ensures a class has only one instance
Provides a simplified interface to a complex subsystem

text: Which pattern hides the complexity of a subsystem?
What problem does the Strategy pattern solve?
options: Decouples an abstraction from its implementation
Reduces memory usage by sharing objects

text: Which pattern is typically used to create families of related objects?
Which pattern defines the skeleton of an algorithm, letting subclasses override specific steps?
The Singleton pattern ensures a class has only one instance.
The Observer pattern is used to create objects without specifying the exact class.
The Facade pattern provides a unified interface to a set of interfaces in a subsystem.
Name a creational pattern that uses a single method to create objects of different types.
